warmup.label: warm-up
warmup.detail: all 6 strings, alternate picking. clean transitions, no buzz.

warmup.label: warm-up
warmup.detail: each finger lifts only when needed.

warmup.label: warm-up
warmup.detail: skip a string between every note. clean muting.

warmup.label: warm-up
warmup.detail: smooth transitions, every change on the down-beat.

warmup.label: warm-up
warmup.detail: 30s each pair. low fret, easy stretch. don't crush the neck.

warmup.label: warm-up
warmup.detail: each finger, each string. focus on smooth slide, no fret noise.

dexterity.label: finger independence
dexterity.detail: 20s on each pair. even volume, not speed.

dexterity.label: finger independence
dexterity.detail: pull-offs only after the first attack.

dexterity.label: finger independence
dexterity.detail: single string, each finger combo. pluck only the first note.

dexterity.label: finger independence
dexterity.detail: ladder using only fingers 1 and 4. ignore the others.

dexterity.label: finger independence
dexterity.detail: one finger across two adjacent strings, same fret.

technique.label: alt picking
technique.detail: metronome on quarters. 3 clean reps → +5 bpm.

technique.label: alt picking
technique.detail: two notes per string, outside picking only.

technique.label: tremolo
technique.detail: fast 16ths on one note. relaxed wrist.

technique.label: palm muting
technique.detail: low E open. tight pocket, even tone.

technique.label: hybrid picking
technique.detail: pick the 6th, pluck the 4th. work down to 5+3, 4+2.

technique.label: string crossing
technique.detail: down-up across all 6 strings, ascending and descending.

technique.label: raking
technique.detail: one motion across 3 muted strings into a target note.

scales.label: scales
scales.detail: asc + desc. say the root each time you hit it.

scales.label: scales
scales.detail: frets 9-12. ends where box 1 begins an octave up.

scales.label: scales
scales.detail: string by string. find every shared note.

scales.label: scales
scales.detail: one minute per box, top to bottom of the neck.

scales.label: scales
scales.detail: starts 6th-string fret 5. relative to C major.

scales.label: scales
scales.detail: minor pent + the b5. lean on the b5 sparingly.

scales.label: scales
scales.drill: A minor pent across one string
scales.detail: all positions on the 5th string only. trains the neck.

scales.label: arpeggios
scales.detail: down-down-down, then pull-off back. clean note separation.

rhythm.label: rhythm
rhythm.detail: Em. metronome on 1+2+3+4. focus on consistency.

rhythm.label: rhythm
rhythm.detail: alternating strokes. wrist motion, not arm.

rhythm.label: rhythm
rhythm.detail: common pop pattern. anchor with index on the off-beats.

rhythm.label: rhythm
rhythm.detail: 8ths but accent the off-beats only. opposite of natural.

rhythm.label: rhythm
rhythm.detail: feel triplets but only play the 1st and 3rd. blues feel.

rhythm.label: rhythm
rhythm.detail: tap your foot on the quarter. all three strokes count.

rhythm.label: rhythm
rhythm.detail: constant 16ths down-up. let chord ring on accents only.

bends_vibrato.label: bending
bends_vibrato.detail: bend until pitch matches fret 8. release controlled.

bends_vibrato.label: bending
bends_vibrato.detail: bend to match fret 9. support with 2nd + 3rd fingers.

bends_vibrato.label: bending
bends_vibrato.detail: play target fret first, then bend up to it from below. close your eyes.

bends_vibrato.label: vibrato
bends_vibrato.detail: 1 push per beat. anchor the wrist, finger as a pivot.

bends_vibrato.label: vibrato
bends_vibrato.detail: slow / medium / fast. pick a different note for each.

bends_vibrato.label: bending
bends_vibrato.detail: bend before plucking, then pluck and release down to pitch.

improv.label: improv
improv.detail: minor pent over major chords. lean on b3 → 3.

improv.label: improv
improv.detail: 16th-note phrasing, lots of muting between notes.

improv.label: improv
improv.detail: Dm7 → G7 → Cmaj7. resolve every phrase to a chord tone.

improv.label: improv
improv.detail: Dm7 → G7. the natural 6 (B) is the magic note.

improv.label: improv
improv.detail: major pent. lean on the 3rd of every chord.

improv.label: improv
improv.detail: C major or A minor pent. resolve to the C and Am chord tones.

improv.label: improv
improv.detail: play 4 bars, rest 4 bars, repeat. forces phrasing.

improv.label: improv
improv.detail: pick a 4-note phrase. play it on 5 different parts of the neck.

theory.label: theory micro
theory.detail: 5 cards from the spaced-rep deck. due cards first.

theory.label: theory micro
theory.detail: say C-A-G-E-D out loud. point to each shape on a fretboard.

theory.label: theory micro
theory.detail: call out 5 intervals (m3, P5, etc.) and find them on the neck.

theory.label: theory micro
theory.detail: C, G, D. write down each chord first.

theory.label: theory micro
theory.detail: C → G → D → A → E → B → F# → C# → G# → D# → A# → F → C.

theory.label: theory micro
theory.detail: go down a minor 3rd. C→Am, G→Em, etc.

review.label: review + log
review.detail: for the drill you cared most about. write the number down.

review.label: review + log
review.detail: tap the mood button in the journal. that's the whole drill.

review.label: review + log
review.drill: name one thing you're proud of
review.detail: one sentence. the smaller the better.
